# Pocket Gull

> Insight beneath the surface. A voice-first clinical co-pilot for AI-augmented patient intake and care plan synthesis.

Pocket Gull is an Angular progressive web application. It combines a Three.js interactive 3D anatomical body map with Google Gemini AI (`gemini-2.5-flash` via `@google/adk` multi-agent orchestration) and the Web Speech API to help clinicians rapidly synthesize patient intake data into structured care plan recommendations.

- Repository: https://github.com/philgear/pocketgull

---

## Architecture & Codebase Design ("How the Sauce is Made")

### 1. State Management (Angular Signals)
- **Centralized State**: All patient details, vitals, issues, and active diagnostics are managed reactively in [PatientStateService](file:///c:/Users/philg/Pocketgull/pocketgull/src/services/patient-state.service.ts) using Angular Signals (`computed`, `signal`, `effect`).
- **Demo Mode**: When launching sandbox demo mode, the application pre-selects the **Charles Darwin** historical patient case (`p_charles_darwin`), populating his symptoms and historical clinical analysis report synchronously without requiring remote calls.

### 2. Clinician Authorization & Lock System
- **Registered Clinicians Store**: Clinicians are registered locally. Their details are managed in `localStorage` under `pg_registered_clinicians` via [FirestoreSyncService](file:///c:/Users/philg/Pocketgull/pocketgull/src/services/firestore-sync.service.ts). The default clinician is `dpo@pocketgull.app` (PIN: `1234`).
- **Restricted Entry Gateway**: If a user is not authorized, the login page displays a restricted access banner prompting them to sign in or create an account. The sign-up form creates a local profile.
- **Session Locking (Idle Protection)**: [SessionStateService](file:///c:/Users/philg/Pocketgull/pocketgull/src/services/session-state.service.ts) tracks user activity. After 10 minutes of inactivity, the session is locked.
- **Gesture/PIN Unlock Pad**: Authorized clinicians can resume their locked session by typing their 4-digit PIN or drawing any beach item (e.g. wave, palm tree, "X") on the canvas lock screen. Unauthenticated users are bypassed to the registration gateway.

### 3. AI Orchestration Layer
- **Multi-Agent Synthesizer**: [ClinicalIntelligenceService](file:///c:/Users/philg/Pocketgull/pocketgull/src/services/clinical-intelligence.service.ts) calls the Google Gemini API. It uses `@google/adk` `InMemoryRunner` to parallelize multiple sub-agents, each processing one diagnostic lens (Overview, Protocols, Nutrition, Monitoring, Education).
- **Fallback Modalities**: Automatically falls back to mock responses if Google Gemini API keys are configured with placeholder values.

### 4. Interactive 3D Mapping & Annotation
- **Three.js Body Map**: [Body3dViewerComponent](file:///c:/Users/philg/Pocketgull/pocketgull/src/components/body-3d-viewer.component.ts) renders a procedural skeleton and muscular mesh. Clicking anatomical zones correlates symptoms directly to the patient issues state.
- **Task Bracketing**: Double-clicking clinical items shifts them through a validation cycle (Normal → Added → Removed) so clinicians manually vet recommendations.

---

## Technology Stack

- **Framework**: Angular — Signals-based, Zoneless, with SSR and Client-Side Hydration
- **Visualization**: Three.js
- **AI/ML**: Google GenAI SDK, Google Agent Development Kit (`@google/adk`), Web Speech API
- **Backend**: Express.js (Node.js) — proxies PubMed, handles SSR rendering
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS, Dieter Rams-inspired design system
- **Export**: jsPDF, FHIR R4 Bundle standard (Unicode-safe Base64)
